objective: On-board data from Oracle source systems to GCP by building batch ingestion pipelines.
business_context: Centralise Oracle operational data on GCP to enable analytics and reporting as part of the data platform modernisation programme.
functional_requirements: Ingest batch data from Oracle source systems into GCP
Execute pipeline on a hourly schedule
Handle up to 10 GB of data per pipeline run
Complete each pipeline run end-to-end within less than 1 hr of trigger
Deploy and operate pipelines in the Dev environment
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline run completes end-to-end within less than 1 hr of trigger
Pipeline executes successfully on hourly schedule
Pipeline handles 10 GB data volume per run without failure
Pipeline runs successfully in the Dev environment
